result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates a new code generator CLI project

Usage:
  CodeGenerator.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)  The name of the solution to create
  -o, --output <output>         The output directory (defaults to current directory) [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-quinntynebrown.codegenerator.cli-1.2.0-263c98dce6be47fc9b345645629909ca]
  -f, --framework <framework>   The target framework (e.g. net8.0, net9.0) [default: net9.0]
  --slnx                        Use .slnx (XML-based) solution format instead of .sln [default: False]
  --version                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

Commands:
  install  Installs a Claude skill for CodeGenerator
